_model_note: exp_018 champion stage-1 model (GRPO pass-2). Same as run_inference.py STAGE1_MODEL — apples-to-apples baseline.

probe._comment: DSMLP go/no-go probe: 40-question dev free-form mini-eval across prompt conditions. Confirms (1) model emits runnable final code, (2) which variant wins, (3) net dev-FF accuracy vs baseline. Gate: PAL emits >=60% runnable code AND net accuracy >= baseline.
probe._force_note: 9 precision-recoverable dev-FF errors (analyze_precision_ceiling.py) forced into the sample so the probe directly observes recovery, not just code emission.

tool._note: executor.py sandbox limits. 5s/4GiB is ample for sympy/numpy final-answer computation.
tool._judge_note: judge_timeout_s: per-item SIGKILL budget for safe_judge.py. auto_judge has no internal timeout and hung ~6h in the v1 probe; 20s is generous for a single sympy comparison and bounds the worst case at 160*20s if every judge hangs (it won't).

vllm._dtype_note: A5000 (sm 8.6) supports bf16. On a T4 fallback use float16.
vllm._oom_fix_note: bug-040: vLLM 0.8.5 V1 OOM'd at batched_tokens=20480/util=0.90 (760 MiB MLP buffer, 423 free). Fixed: batched_tokens=8192 (buf3 -> 304 MiB), util=0.85, max_num_seqs=16, enforce_eager (frees 2.11 GiB CUDA-graph pools). Eager is fine for a 160-gen probe.

notes: exp_040 one-shot PAL precision lever. See notes.md (hypothesis: ~20% of dev FF errors are precision-recoverable, ceiling ~+4.5pp overall dev) and postcomp/DEVLOG.md (2026-06-05).
